summary: Enterprise-grade LMS on Angular 21 in an Nx monorepo with SSR, SignalR realtime, and bilingual RTL support.
bullets: Contributed to building an enterprise-grade LMS using Angular 21 within an Nx monorepo architecture, supporting multiple applications with SSR and scalable modular development.

Developed complex features including real-time data streaming with SignalR, dynamic forms, reusable data tables, multi-step wizards, role-based access control, and bilingual (Arabic/English) RTL support.
Built reusable, configuration-driven components and dynamic CRUD modules to accelerate delivery and ensure consistency across the platform.
Applied Clean Architecture, SOLID principles, and modern Angular patterns (Standalone Components, Signals, Functional Guards) to ensure maintainability and high code quality.
Implemented reactive programming (RxJS + Signals), lazy loading, HTTP interceptors, and performance optimization techniques for large-scale applications.
Integrated REST APIs, file uploads, data visualization (Chart.js, FullCalendar), and export utilities (Excel, PDF, CSV) for rich, data-driven user experiences.
Delivered responsive, accessible UIs using PrimeNG, TailwindCSS, and a custom design system aligned with product requirements.
Collaborated in an Agile (SCRUM) environment using Git, GitHub, Jira, and Figma to deliver production-ready features efficiently.

summary: Modular Angular 15+ UI components, performance optimization, and REST API integrations.
bullets: Built and optimized modular Angular 15+ UI components achieving 100% mobile-first compliance.
Improved page-load speed by 40% using lazy loading, code splitting, and image optimization.
Collaborated in Agile sprints with backend and UX teams through Jira and Slack.
Implemented RESTful API integrations that reduced response latency by 30%.
Conducted code reviews and enforced ESLint / Prettier standards, decreasing bugs by 20%.

summary: Mentored MEARN Stack trainees on Angular, React, TypeScript, and modern frontend.
bullets: Delivered technical sessions on Angular, React, TypeScript, and JavaScript (ES6+) for MEARN Stack trainees.
Mentored 30+ students through hands-on projects, focusing on component architecture and API integration.
Evaluated and refactored student code for scalability and performance, improving project success rate by 35%.
Introduced Agile Scrum practices and Git workflows, enhancing team collaboration and delivery efficiency.

summary: Extended and optimized ERP modules using Python on the Odoo Framework.
bullets: Extended and optimized ERP modules using Python (Odoo Framework), boosting efficiency by 25%.
Refactored legacy OOP modules to enhance maintainability and reduce errors by 15%.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver customized business solutions on time.
